ddls:
CREATE TABLE "internet_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the internet plan */,
  "speed_download" TEXT /* Download speed of the plan */,
  "speed_upload" TEXT /* Upload speed of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of the plan (e.g., fiber, cable) */,
  "success_rate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plan has a high success rate */,
  "data_limit" TEXT /* Data limit for the plan */,
  "contract_length" TEXT /* Length of the contract */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Fee for early termination of the contract */,
  "available_regions" TEXT /* Regions where the plan is available */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotional code associated with the plan */,
  "is_unlimited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plan is unlimited in terms of data usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer subscribed */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has opted in for marketing communications */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internet plan subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, cancelled) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used during subscription */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subscription has been renewed */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internet plan */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the performance was recorded */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the plan during the period */,
  "downtime_hours" REAL /* Total downtime hours for the plan during the period */,
  "latency" REAL /* Average latency of the plan */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Average jitter of the plan */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Average packet loss of the plan */,
  "uptime_percentage" REAL /* Uptime percentage of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_performance_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the support request */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported by the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the support request (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support request (e.g., technical, billing) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the support request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the support request */,
  "assigned_employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee handling the support request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_assigned_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription associated with this billing */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Total amount due for the billing period */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the billing record */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee applied */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., residential, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number (if applicable) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address associated with the payment method */,
  "security_code" TEXT /* Security code for credit cards */,
  "card_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the card holder */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address associated with the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the internet plan offered by the competitor */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the competitor's plan */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the competitor's plan */,
  "data_limit" TEXT /* Data limit for the competitor's plan */,
  "contract_length" TEXT /* Length of the contract for the competitor's plan */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Fee for early termination of the competitor's plan */,
  "available_regions" TEXT /* Regions where the competitor's plan is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internet plan */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the usage statistics were recorded */,
  "data_usage" REAL /* Total data usage for the plan during the period */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak usage hours for the plan */,
  "upload_usage" REAL /* Total upload usage for the plan */,
  "peak_upload_hours" TEXT /* Peak upload usage hours for the plan */,
  "download_upload_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of download to upload usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internet plan being reviewed */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "support_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for customer support */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for service quality */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for value for money */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "campaign_results" TEXT /* Results of the campaign */,
  "target_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target internet plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., customer support, technician) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
